div.h2: Three-Level View: One HTTP Request Across Application / OS / Hardware

p.em: Single GET request — annotated latency at every transition

g.text: Action | DMA transfer: packet → ring buffer
Handler | ISR saved to IDT entry for NIC IRQ
Action | DMA reads socket send buffer
ACK | Remote TCP ACK: 1 RTT later
3. TCP stack: decode IP + TCP headers
4. Copy payload → socket recv buffer (87 KB)
Target | Thread blocked in select() or recv()
Core | Thread migrated if current core busy
1. resolve each path component via dcache
3. dcache MISS: disk read for directory inode
Action | copy response bytes: user → kernel
State | worker thread assigned from pool
